strengths: 17+ years of software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum.
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, demonstrating hands-on engagement with agentic AI tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and builder mindset through founding GISCollective, contributing to startups, and consistently shipping open-source projects.
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field, and formal AI/ML expertise appears limited to the most recent ~14 months — thin foundation for a role requiring recognized AI authority.

Role is a director-level IC requiring enterprise advisory and strategic customer engagement; the resume shows no evidence of that scope — no C-suite interaction, no cloud platform strategy, no partner advisory work.

Title progression stalls at Senior/Staff Software Developer with no principal, architect, or distinguished engineer designations, suggesting the candidate has not yet operated at the seniority this role demands.
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical breadth and a builder ethos that partially aligns with the role's hands-on AI and cloud expectations, but the fit breaks down on the dimensions that matter most: his AI work is nascent and narrow, his career shows no trajectory toward enterprise strategy or customer advisory, and his seniority level — while respectable — falls short of the director-level IC profile the role requires. Without a stronger AI pedigree or evidence of operating at organizational scale, he would be a significant reach for this position.
